temporal_description: A low-angle, static shot captures a group of five figures walking toward the camera down a long, dimly lit wooden corridor. The setting is dark and atmospheric, with the wooden floor and walls dominating the frame. The figures are silhouetted against a faint light at the far end of the hall. The person in the center appears to be a woman, while the others are less distinct. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The audio is filled with a low, ominous, and suspenseful ambient drone that creates a sense of unease and anticipation. The camera remains stationary, creating a sense of depth and foreboding as the figures advance. The group of figures disappears from view, plunging the scene into near-total darkness. The shot is now focused on the empty, dark wooden floor, which fills the lower half of the frame. The faint, shadowy background is barely visible. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. A sudden, loud, and jarring metallic crash, like a heavy object being thrown or a structure collapsing, shatters the quiet atmosphere. The camera angle is still low and static, looking across the dark wooden floor. In the distance, a dark, indistinct shape, possibly a person or an object, falls or is thrown onto the floor, creating a small cloud of dust or debris. The "风行网" watermark is still present. Following the impact, a faint, scraping sound is heard, as if something has landed and is shifting on a hard surface. The camera remains fixed on the dark wooden floor as the dust cloud from the previous action begins to settle. The indistinct shape in the background is no longer visible. The "风行网" watermark is still visible in the top right corner.
